prompt:
You are an expert advertising copywriter.
Write ONE platform-specific ad copy using:
1) Recommended selling points: ["Youthful Color", "Bright", "Vibrant Orange"]
2) Audience profile:
   - age_group: teen
   - audience_segments: ["beauty_oriented"]
   - tags: ["beauty"]
   - notes: 
3) Platform preferences:
   - platform: taobao|other
   - style: short_video_hook|product_feature_focused|generic
   - length: short|medium
   - tone: warm

Platform rules (platform = "douyin"):
- If platform is xiaohongshu: prefer storytelling + lifestyle hook, include 3-6 hashtags at the end.
- If platform is douyin: prefer short hook + benefit bullets, keep it punchy.
- If platform is taobao: emphasize value/benefits, clearer CTA, less poetic.
- If platform is other: generic but still persuasive.

Output requirements:
- Return plain ad copy text only
- Do NOT return JSON
- Do NOT include explanations about your process
- Keep length aligned with `length` preference

raw_model_result.copy:
set to `short`
- Ensure all required elements and preferences are included

[Short Video Hook]
Got a sudden craving for some bright vibes? 🌟 Try our Vibrant Orange makeup palette. Youthful colors, bold and true. Swipe right now and see the magic!

[Bullets]
✨ Youthful Color
✨ Bright & Vibrant Orange
✨ Perfect for teen beauty enthusiasts 💅

[Voucher]
Claim your exclusive offer now! #beautytrend #makeuplove

[Short Video Hook]
Get ready to shine with vibrant color! 🌈 Dive into our Vibrant Orange makeup palette. Youthful hues that'll turn heads. Click to explore!

[Bullets]
✨ Youthful Color
✨ Bright & Vibrant Orange
✨ Ideal for teen beauty fans 💅

[Voucher]
Unlock your new look today! #beautygoals #teenbeauty

[Short Video Hook]
Feeling a bit orangey? 🍊 Our Vibrant Orange palette can change everything! Youthful and bold, perfect for teens. Swipe right now!

[Bullets]
✨ Youth
